title: Backpropagation Through a Computational Graph
description: A flowchart illustrating the forward pass (computing output and loss) and the backward pass (calculating gradients via the chain rule) for a simple neural network node, demonstrating the core concept of automatic differentiation.
relationships: Forward pass: Data flows from Input to Loss
Backward pass: Gradients (dL/da, da/dz, dz/dw) are calculated backwards from Loss to Input using the chain rule
Update: The gradient dL/dw is used to update the weight w
